title: 860 Pcs Small Screws Assortment Kit, M2 M2.5 M3 Micro Tiny Mini Cross Flat Head Countersunk Screws for Phone Watch Spectacle Computer Laptop Glasses(Black, Silver)
features: High-strength Material: Small screws assortment is made of carbon steel, which has high strength and durability, can withstand large mechanical stress, and is suitable for various application scenarios that require high stability

Cross Screws Design: Laptop screws adopt cross screw design, which is easy to install and disassemble with a cross screwdriver. It is easy to operate and suitable for quick assembly and maintenance. It is an ideal choice for engineers and DIY enthusiasts

Flat Head Screws/Countersunk Screws Design: Countersunk screw design, the screw can be flush with the surface after installation, which is not only beautiful, but also reduces the interference of the protruding part to the surrounding parts. Suitable for applications that require a flat surface
Wide Application: Suitable for electronic equipment, precision instruments, model making, mobile phones, computers, laptops and other fields, or other repairs that require small screws

Package Includes: 860 pcs in total, provide M2, M2.5, M3 and other sizes to choose from, tiny screws meet the installation needs of different precision equipment and components, and ensure the precise matching of screws and holes
description: What are the advantages of our screws for glasses? 1. Glass screws are made of carbon steel, with high strength and durability, can withstand large mechanical stress, and are suitable for various application scenarios that require high stability 2. Watch screws are designed with cross screws, which are easy to install and remove with a cross screwdriver. They are easy to operate and suitable for quick assembly and maintenance 3. Micro screws are designed with countersunk screws. The screws can be flush with the surface after installation. Not only beautiful, but also reduce the interference of the protruding parts on the surrounding parts. Suitable for applications that require a flat surface 4. All tiny screws are placed in a storage box, which is well organized and easy to take and store without confusion or loss 5.
